object.translatableAttribute: Thank you for installing 0 A.D. Empires Ascendant!

object.name: text1
object.translatableAttribute: 0 A.D. is still in active development. You may encounter bugs, and some features are not as fleshed out as we would like. However, the game is being improved constantly. Expect some content drops and balance changes each release as we're still working to make the game the best it can be! Check our website and forums for updates!

object.name: text2
object.translatableAttribute: The game is fully playable. But at times it can have performance problems with large maps and a great number of units, especially on weaker hardware.

object.name: text3
object.translatableAttribute: 0 A.D. is Free Software: you can participate in its development. If you want to help with art, sound, gameplay or programming, make sure to join our official forum.

object.name: displaySplashScreenText
object.translatableAttribute: Show this message in the future
